description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §6 (knob surface), §11 (non-goals: knob bodies).

Work:
- spawn_opt(closure, opts) API at IR and runtime level.
- opts is a struct with min_heap_size: Option<u8> and reserved fields.
- Only min_heap_size is wired in v1; rest are accepted but ignored.

Acceptance: API exists; existing spawn(closure) desugars to spawn_opt(closure, Default::default()).
title: fz-cps.GC.6: spawn-options skeleton
